title: Restoring Hope Through Compassion And Service
description: St. Hannah Foundation is committed to improving the lives of widows, children, families and vulnerable individuals through education, empowerment, outreach and practical support. We believe every individual deserves dignity, opportunity and the chance to thrive regardless of their circumstances.
vision: To build a world where every child and family, especially the overlooked, underserved, and unheard, experiences the fullness of their God-given potential. We envision communities restored, futures rebuilt, and generations empowered through love, structure, and transformative support.
mission: St. Hannah Foundation exists to uplift families and communities across Africa through dignified access to resources, education, and community empowerment, igniting hope and restoring the power of possibility.
